title: Friesodielsia platyphylla

The classification of Friesodielsia platyphylla is further refined at the genus and species levels, with Friesodielsia being a genus within the Annonaceae family. This classification places Friesodielsia platyphylla within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. At the kingdom level, Friesodielsia platyphylla is classified as a Plantae, indicating its status as a plant.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
